notes: DIM/DEFPOINTS dimension fragment with DIMDOT inserts and MTEXT 700

rationale.evidence: All geometry sits on DIM or DEFPOINTS. Three LINEs form extension and dimension segments, two INSERT refs to DIMDOT, MTEXT shows numeric value 700, plus three DEFPOINTS POINTs—classic exploded dimension anatomy. No wall/plan layers appear.
rationale.rule: Anonymous *D* blocks whose entities are confined to DIM/DEFPOINTS with DIMDOT and numeric MTEXT should be classified as dimension caches, not building fabric.
rationale.counterfactual: If WALL/A-WALL layer polylines or closed room outlines dominated instead of DIMDOT+numeric MTEXT, the role would flip away from 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot see what building edge the 700 measure references or whether the parent DIMENSION entity still exists outside this anonymous block.

notes: Horizontal dim cache: DIM lines, DIMDOT, MTEXT 1170

rationale.rule: When layer histogram is only DIM+DEFPOINTS and inserts name DIMDOT with a length MTEXT, label as 치수캐시 with zero wall likelihood.
rationale.counterfactual: Presence of structural layers (WALL, A-WALL) or furniture blocks would overturn the dimension-only judgment.
rationale.uncertainty: Projection alone cannot confirm measured object type (opening vs clear span) or units beyond the raw numeral.

rationale.counterfactual: If the layer were WALL/A-WALL with long parallel centerlines or thick cores instead of INSUL, role would shift to 평면 부분도 with high wall_likelihood.
